rubric_name: IELTS Writing Task 2 - Simplified Rubric (Beginner to near-B2)
overall_band_rule: Average the 4 criteria band scores, then round to nearest 0.5 using standard IELTS rounding (round .25 up to nearest .5, e.g. 5.25 -> 5.5, 5.0 stays 5.0).

sub_bands.task_response: Lac de hoac khong tra loi duoc yeu cau; khong co luan diem; bai qua ngan (<80 tu)
sub_bands.coherence_cohesion: Khong chia doan hoac chi 1 doan duy nhat; cau roi rac, gan nhu khong co tu noi
sub_bands.lexical_resource: Tu vung cuc ky han che, lap tu lien tuc; loi chinh ta nhieu lam kho hieu nghia
sub_bands.grammatical_range: Cau gan nhu khong co cau truc hoan chinh; loi chia dong tu/mao tu nghiem trong, sai lech nghia

sub_bands.task_response: Nhu band 1.0, co the co 1 cau lien quan de nhung khong phat trien
sub_bands.lexical_resource: Nhu band 1.0, von tu it hon 50 tu khac nhau

sub_bands.task_response: Co co gang tra loi de nhung chi neu 1-2 y roi rac, khong phat trien; nhieu doan lac huong
sub_bands.coherence_cohesion: Co chia doan nhung khong theo logic ro; dung rat it tu noi co ban (and, but)
sub_bands.lexical_resource: Tu vung co ban (basic words), van lap nhieu; loi chinh ta/word formation gay can tro
sub_bands.grammatical_range: Chi dung duoc cau don; loi ngu phap co ban day dac nhung bat dau tao duoc cau co nghia

sub_bands.task_response: Tuong tu band 2.0, y ro hon mot chut nhung van thieu vi du
sub_bands.lexical_resource: Tuong tu band 2.0, it loi chinh ta hon
sub_bands.grammatical_range: Tuong tu band 2.0, mot vai cau don chinh xac

sub_bands.task_response: Tra loi mot phan de bai, y con rat han che va chua ro rang
sub_bands.coherence_cohesion: Bat dau co logic don gian giua cac cau nhung con roi
sub_bands.lexical_resource: Von tu rat han che, error co the lam sai lech thong diep
sub_bands.grammatical_range: Cau don la chu dao, loi ngu phap va dau cau chiem uu the

sub_bands.task_response: Co co gang tra loi de nhung chi neu 1-2 y roi rac, khong phat trien; nhieu doan lac huong
sub_bands.coherence_cohesion: Co chia doan nhung khong theo logic ro; dung rat it tu noi co ban (and, but)
sub_bands.lexical_resource: Tu vung co ban, van lap nhieu; loi chinh ta/word formation gay can tro nhung it hon band 2.0
sub_bands.grammatical_range: Chi dung duoc cau don, bat dau xuat hien cau ghep don gian nhung nhieu loi

sub_bands.task_response: Tra loi de o muc toi thieu; 1 luan diem chinh, thieu vi du/lap luan cu the; ~120-150 tu
sub_bands.coherence_cohesion: Co chia doan (intro/body/conclusion) nhung sap xep chua hop ly; linking words lap lai may moc
sub_bands.lexical_resource: Tu vung co ban, doi khi dung sai nghia/khong hop van phong
sub_bands.grammatical_range: Cau don chu dao, thu cau ghep (and/but/because) nhung loi nhieu

sub_bands.task_response: Tra loi du cac phan de bai nhung phat trien y con so sai; co 1-2 vi du don gian; ~150-200 tu
sub_bands.coherence_cohesion: Chia doan ro hon, moi doan co 1 y; dung them linking words co ban (also, because, so) du doi khi sai cho
sub_bands.lexical_resource: Tu vung co ban nhung chon tu chinh xac hon; bat dau co collocation don gian dung
sub_bands.grammatical_range: Cau ghep dung on dinh hon; bat dau thu cau phuc don gian, loi van pho bien nhung khong luon can tro nghia

sub_bands.task_response: De cap du cac phan yeu cau; co quan diem nhung chua nhat quan xuyen suot; y con han che, it vi du cu the; ~200-220 tu
sub_bands.coherence_cohesion: Co to chuc tong the nhung progression chua ro; referencing doi khi gay kho hieu
sub_bands.lexical_resource: Tu vung du dung cho chu de nhung con hep; mot so loi spelling/word formation khong dang ke
sub_bands.grammatical_range: Ket hop cau don va cau phuc nhung cau phuc con loi nhieu hon cau don

sub_bands.task_response: Quan diem ro rang va giu nhat quan xuyen suot; luan diem co vi du ho tro du chua phat trien sau; dat ~250 tu
sub_bands.coherence_cohesion: To chuc mach lac hon, moi doan 1 y chinh ro rang; dung da dang hon linking words (however, in addition, for example) du doi khi hoi may moc
sub_bands.lexical_resource: Bat dau thu tu vung it pho bien hon; collocation dung nhieu hon; loi chinh ta hiem
sub_bands.grammatical_range: Cau phuc dung tu nhien hon, ty le loi giam ro; mot so loi ngu phap/dau cau nhung hiem khi gay hieu lam

sub_bands.task_response: De cap day du, phat trien y kha ky voi vi du lien quan; doi luc lap luan hoi tong quat nhung van bam de
sub_bands.coherence_cohesion: Progression ro rang toan bai; cohesive devices dung hieu qua du doi cho hoi cung
sub_bands.lexical_resource: Tu vung kha da dang, collocation chinh xac phan lon; dung synonym de tranh lap
sub_bands.grammatical_range: Da dang cau truc phuc (menh de quan he, dieu kien, bi dong); phan lon cau khong loi

sub_bands.task_response: Luan diem phat trien tot, vi du cu the va lien quan chat che; giu trong tam xuyen suot bai
sub_bands.coherence_cohesion: Chuyen y tu nhien, referencing chinh xac; cau truc doan van chat che, gan nhu khong gay kho hieu
sub_bands.lexical_resource: Von tu linh hoat hon, mot so tu it pho bien dung dung ngu canh; loi chinh ta/word formation hiem gap
sub_bands.grammatical_range: Kiem soat ngu phap va dau cau tot, chi con loi nho/le te; linh hoat chuyen doi giua cac loai cau

notes: Thang nay dung o band 6.5 vi target user la zero den can B2, khong can mo ta band 7-9 (advanced/native-like).
Agent nen cham rieng 4 tieu chi truoc, sau do tinh trung binh cong va lam tron theo quy tac IELTS chuan de ra overall band.
Display score chi dung de hien thi nhanh (progress bar/badge), band le 0.5 la so lieu chinh de feedback chi tiet.
